text.title: Business Model Research Agentic Pipeline
text.summary: Eight-step workflow, subagents, prompt patterns for build and validate passes, SDD integration, and agent gotchas.

list.item: 1. Value chain map: agent diagrams Suppliers -> Product -> Customers with cost arrows; founder confirms before any price is named
2. Revenue-model shortlist: pick 2 of 5 archetypes that fit the value chain; reject others on record
3. Comparable harvesting: WebSearch 3-5 public competitors per shortlisted model; pull pricing pages, S-1/10-K if listed
4. Canvas fill: populate all 9 blocks; mark each cell Hard/Soft
5. Unit economics block: compute CAC, LTV, LTV:CAC, payback in P10/P50/P90
6. Stress test: run 5 tests; model passes only if it survives all five at P50
7. Verdict: one of {viable, viable-with-fixes, not-viable}; if not-viable, propose 2 alternative models and re-loop step 2
8. Validation pass: peer agent re-reads against assumptions ledger and returns delta list

example.note: Build prompt — step sequence enforced, Hard/Soft tagging required:
example.code: You are a business-model analyst. Build a Business Model Canvas + unit economics for: <product idea>. Constraints: <ICP, geo, stage>. Steps: (1) map value chain, (2) shortlist 2 of 5 revenue archetypes, (3) pull 3 public comparables per archetype, (4) fill Canvas with H/S tags per cell, (5) compute CAC/LTV/payback in P10/P50/P90, (6) run all 5 stress tests, (7) emit verdict. Refuse to average ranges. Cite source URL + retrieval date for every Hard cell. Output: markdown matching business-model-canvas.md sections.

example.note: Validate prompt — returns delta list, not a rewrite:
example.code: Validate this business model: <paste canvas + unit economics>. Check: (1) is gross margin sourced or assumed? (2) does churn vary by cohort age? (3) does LTV:CAC survive at P10? (4) are revenue streams additive or substitutive? (5) is payback < 12 months at P50? Return delta list, not rewrite.

list.item: Output lives at .aidocs/product_docs/business-model.md; assumptions ledger at .aidocs/product_docs/business-model-assumptions.csv
Reads SOM from market-research.md as the revenue ceiling; refuses to publish if year-3 forecast > SOM
roadmap.md MRR/ARR targets must reference a Canvas version; bumps require a new model run and a delta entry
spec.md lists revenue-affecting requirements traced to a Canvas cell (Key Activities or Revenue Streams)
Churn hallucination: model invents 2%/month "industry standard" — require a Baremetrics or ChartMogul benchmark URL or a 10-K citation.
ARPU vs ARR confusion: monthly and annual numbers mixed in the same LTV calc — LTV is off by 12x and goes unnoticed.
Confirmation bias: founder mentions "$10M ARR by year 3" — agent reverse-engineers customer count and price; pre-commit Canvas before sharing the target.
Static churn: one churn number for 36 months; require cohort-variable modeling (month-1 churn is 3-10x month-12).
Margin laziness: agent uses revenue as if it were profit; require a Cost Structure block before any LTV cell renders.
Output drift: each rerun rewrites the entire Canvas; lock headings to business-model-canvas.md and only fill cells; version the file.
